78340773.title: 2025 end-of-year rugby union internationals
78340773.extract: The 2025 end-of-year rugby union internationals, also known as the Autumn Internationals or Quilter Nations Series, are international rugby union matches that will be mostly played in the Northern Hemisphere during the November international window. The fixtures for the Quilter Nations Series, which includes only the matches involving at least one Six Nations member team, were announced on 18 February 2025.

categories.title: Category:Articles with unsourced statements from November 2025
